generations.label: 5th Gen
generations.common_competitors: Honda Accord, Toyota Camry, Hyundai Sonata

known_issues.title: CVT transmission failure
known_issues.description: The Jatco CVT used across this generation has a well-documented history of premature failure, presenting as a shudder, whine, or loss of power under load, and is the single most common reason these cars end up scrapped early.
known_issues.symptoms: A shudder or vibration under acceleration, a whining or humming noise from the transmission, or a sudden loss of power under load and at highway cruise.
known_issues.recommendation: Check for CVT-related extended warranty or class action settlement paperwork, and feel closely for shudder or whine during acceleration and at highway cruise.

known_issues.title: Engine mount failure
known_issues.description: Rubber engine mounts break down and cause noticeable vibration through the cabin, especially at idle and under acceleration.
known_issues.symptoms: Excess vibration felt through the seats and steering wheel at idle and when accelerating, sometimes with a clunk when shifting into gear.
known_issues.recommendation: Feel for excess vibration at a stoplight with the car in drive and brake applied.

known_issues.title: Oil consumption and timing chain rattle
known_issues.description: The 2.5L QR25DE engine can burn oil faster than normal and develop a timing chain rattle on cold start as components wear.
known_issues.symptoms: A rattling noise from the engine for the first few seconds after a cold start, and a lower than expected oil level between changes.
known_issues.recommendation: Ask for oil consumption history and listen for a rattle for the first few seconds after a cold start.

known_issues.title: Secondary air injection pump failure
known_issues.description: The emissions air injection pump can fail and trigger a check engine light, though it does not affect drivability.
known_issues.symptoms: An illuminated check engine light with no noticeable change in how the car drives.
known_issues.recommendation: Scan for stored codes before buying to rule out a pending air injection pump fault.

generations.label: 2nd Gen
generations.common_competitors: Honda CR-V, Toyota RAV4, Ford Escape

known_issues.title: CVT transmission failure
known_issues.description: The Jatco CVT in this generation is subject to a class action settlement over premature failure, typically presenting as shuddering, hesitation, or a burning smell before it fails outright.
known_issues.symptoms: A shudder or hesitation under acceleration, a burning smell from the transmission area, and eventually a complete loss of forward drive.
known_issues.recommendation: Ask if the CVT warranty extension was applied for this VIN, and test drive at both low speed and sustained highway cruise feeling for shudder.

known_issues.title: Oil consumption on the 2.5L engine
known_issues.description: Some engines consume oil faster than normal between changes, which can go unnoticed until the low oil light comes on.
known_issues.symptoms: The low oil warning light illuminating between scheduled services, with no visible leak underneath the vehicle.
known_issues.recommendation: Check the oil level and condition on the dipstick and ask for oil change records.

known_issues.title: AWD propshaft coupling failure
known_issues.description: The rear coupling that engages AWD can wear out, causing clunking noises or a loss of all-wheel drive engagement.
known_issues.symptoms: A clunking noise from underneath the vehicle when accelerating or turning, and reduced traction in slippery conditions.
known_issues.recommendation: Test the vehicle on a gravel or wet surface if possible to confirm AWD engagement.

known_issues.title: Push-button start and key fob detection issues
known_issues.description: The intelligent key system can intermittently fail to detect the fob, preventing the push-button start from working.
known_issues.symptoms: The push-button start failing to recognize the key fob, requiring the fob to be moved around or pressed directly against the button to start the vehicle.
known_issues.recommendation: Test starting the vehicle with the fob in a pocket and also with a spare key if available.
